summary: First test run for Kalam Children's Colour Books ecommerce app. All 15 backend API tests passed. All frontend flows tested successfully - home page, product listing, product detail, cart, checkout, order confirmation, and admin panel.

design_issues.screen: Products page - 7th product 'Marvel' has no image
issues: A test product 'Marvel' from a previous test run (not cleaned up) appears in the product list with no image. Not a bug but leftover test data.

action_items: Minor: Clean up test product 'Marvel' left from previous test data via admin panel or seed reset
critical_code_review_comments: seed_products() only seeds if count==0 - this means manually created products won't be replaced but also old test data persists across restarts
No brute force protection on /api/auth/login endpoint - could be a security concern for production
CORS is set to allow_origins=['*'] - should be restricted to specific origins in production
seed_data_creation: Created test order KLM-1003 and KLM-1004 during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core flows tested and working. 15/15 backend tests pass. Full e2e checkout flow works. Admin CRUD for products works. Order status update works. Minor: leftover 'Marvel' test product in DB from previous runs.
flows_tested: Home page hero section + features + products grid - PASS
Products page with search filter - PASS
Add to Cart + cart count in navbar - PASS
Cart page with quantity controls - PASS
Order confirmation with KLM order number - PASS
